images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a shrink-wrapped warehouse pallet stacked with hundreds of identical small smart devices, parked incongruously in a dim, immaculate network equipment room beside a tidy server rack; an engineer stands before it with a clipboard lowered, sizing up the inheritance; deep inside the shrink-wrap one tiny device indicator glows red. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent on the single glowing indicator — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. No readable text, letters, or numbers anywhere. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
